name: oh-ai-car-web
description: Local web control console for the OH AI car TCP protocol.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/shared && npm run build --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/frontend && npm run build --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/gateway
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev:gateway: npm run build --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/gateway
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --workspace=@oh-ai-car-web/gateway
